card.name: Chankata Kurudrami
card.text: During your turn, Chankata is a 3/3 Human Noble creature with "Legendary creatures you control have flying and lifelink" that's still a planeswalker. [-1]: Search your library for an Aura or Equipment card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. [-5]: You get an emblem with "Concord — Creatures you control have double strike as long as there are four or more card types among permanents you control."

card.name: One With Everything
card.text: Reveal your hand. For each card revealed this way, you may exchange that card with a card you own from outside the game that shares a card type with it.

I, II, III — An opponent may exile a nonland, nontoken permanent they control. If they don't, create a 2/1 blue Avatar enchantment creature token. IV — Create Yikara, a legendary 0/0 white God enchantment creature token with flying and "This creature gets +1/+1 for each creature you control." ​

card.name: Archive
card.text: Put target creature into its owner's library fifth from the top.

card.text: Nivi's vanara forces broke on the demonic city's defenders. It would take a mount of medicine to revive them, and so it did... I — Create a tapped Forest land token. (It has "{T}: Add {G}.") II — Create a tapped token that's a copy of target token you control. III — At the beginning of your next end step, untap all permanents you control and draw a card.

card.name: Murti of Fiery Devotion
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may discard a card for each Shrine you control. If you do, draw that many cards.

card.name: Goldenblade Marauder

card.name: War-Form Evocation
card.text: Target creature you control gets +X/+X until end of turn. At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice that creature. When you do, it deals damage equal to its power to up to one other target creature.

card.text: {2}{R}: Target creature can't block Avenging Asura this turn.

As long as you sacrificed an artifact this turn, Visceral Pyre is a 4/2 Wraith creature in addition to its other types.

Then if that creature has the same mana value as your karma, copy it, except the copy isn't legendary if that creature is legendary.

card.name: Nivi Beholds All
card.text: "C'mon, open wide!" the weary mother chuckled. Little Trija obeyed, as did the maw of the universe within. I — You gain 7 life. Exile the top seven cards of your library. II — Choose any number of land cards from among the exiled cards. Put one onto the battlefield and the rest into your hand. III — Pay {X}. When you do, put any number of nonland permanent cards among the exiled cards with total mana value X or less onto the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Traveler of Three Paths
card.text: Whenever you cast your first spell each turn, do the following based on its types — • Creature — Create a 1/1 white Cleric creature token. • Artifact — Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature. • Enchantment — Scry 1, then draw a card.

card.name: Sikanir, Sandalwood's Grain
card.text: Sikanir can't be blocked by creatures with greater power. Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, scry 1, then incarnate. Then if you've reached nirvana, untap all creatures and lands you control. (Enter your first or the next unentered lifetime in the Wheel of Samsara.)

card.name: Rites of Repentance
